gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor gestures toward the apples on the table with both hands, smiling while inviting attention to the ten apples
a person tilts their head slightly and takes a step closer while looking curiously at the audience, prompting them with a questioning expression
a tutor raises both hands in front, displaying fingers to demonstrate counting from ten down to five, engaging the learners
a person moves their fingers down slowly while counting, stepping back slightly as if to visualize the subtraction
a tutor points enthusiastically to an imaginary number line before them, inviting students to participate in solving the problem together
a person pretends to jump backward, stepping back while counting down from ten, encouraging students to visualize the jumps
a tutor raises both arms in celebration, smiling broadly while stating the answer with excitement, engaging the classroom
a person claps their hands together and nods approvingly, moving toward the learners to celebrate their progress in subtraction
